generated_exposure.exposure_text: Just saw this in my local paper - our region's emergency services are warning that the new strategic autonomy measures are actually making us LESS prepared for real crises. They say the focus on local control is leaving gaps in coordination. As someone who values both security AND civil liberties, this is exactly why we need a balanced approach. #NationalSecurityMatters
